description: A vertical graphic on a white background. The Department of Homeland Security seal and the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the top. A red headline reads New Photo Requirements:, followed by larger red text Stronger Screening, Safer Systems. Italic blue text below reads that effective immediately, if your photograph is older than three years when you file a new immigration form, USCIS will schedule you for a biometrics appointment to take a new photograph. A line-art illustration at the bottom shows two stylized head-and-shoulders figures inside camera-focus brackets with a double-headed arrow between them.
notable_text: New Photo Requirements: Stronger Screening, Safer Systems; if your photograph is older than three years when you file a new immigration form, USCIS will schedule you for a biometrics appointment to take a new photograph
